qa_pairs.question: When experiencing difficulties connecting to an automation node via SSH, what is the recommended test command to identify the problem?
qa_pairs.answer: Users should use the test command `ssh -i ~/.ssh/automation_key -vvv username@robot.rorqual.alliancecan.ca "ls -l"`. This command attempts to connect to the Rorqual automation node, executes the `ls -l` command, and provides very verbose debug output to assist in troubleshooting connection issues.

qa_pairs.question: What actions does the diagnostic command `ssh -i ~/.ssh/automation_key -vvv username@robot.rorqual.alliancecan.ca "ls -l"` perform?
qa_pairs.answer: This diagnostic command attempts to establish an SSH connection to the automation node at Rorqual. It executes the `ls -l` command on the remote server using the specified `~/.ssh/automation_key` SSH key, and generates very verbose (`-vvv`) debug output to help diagnose any connection problems.
